services.title: Technical SEO & Performance
services.description: We fix the hidden technical issues that hold your site back from ranking — Core Web Vitals, crawl architecture, indexation and schema. The engineering foundation every other ranking signal depends on.

services.title: On-Page SEO & Content Strategy
services.description: Content that ranks well and actually converts. Bring your own keywords or commission the full strategy — keyword mapping, content-gap analysis, optimised landing pages and metadata.

services.title: Off-Page SEO & Authority
services.description: Authority earned the durable way — editorial backlinks from real publications, data-led digital PR and brand mentions across the open web. No PBNs; every link earned and defensible.

services.title: Local SEO & Regional Growth
services.description: Be the first business people see when they search nearby. Google Business Profile, local citations, geo-targeted pages and review velocity — own the local pack in every market you serve.

services.title: Reddit & Community Visibility
services.description: Buyers research on Reddit, Quora and niche forums long before Google — and AI assistants quote those threads back. We earn your brand an authentic presence there, plus Answer Engine Optimisation.

whyPoints.title: White-hat only
whyPoints.description: Every link earned and every change documented — built to survive algorithm updates, not chase them. No PBNs, no shortcuts, no risk to your domain.

whyPoints.title: Senior-led team
whyPoints.description: A senior strategist runs your account from day one — not a junior handed a checklist. Direct access to the person doing the work, no layers in between.

whyPoints.title: Transparent reporting
whyPoints.description: Live Looker Studio dashboards refreshed weekly, plus a monthly executive readout. You see the same numbers we do, at the same time.

whyPoints.title: 24-hour response
whyPoints.description: A reply to every email within one business day, one dedicated point of contact, and pre-approval on every change before it ships.

whyPoints.title: Results over hype
whyPoints.description: We sell outcomes, not promises — measurable organic growth tied back to pipeline. NDA-ready, 30-day rolling, no long lock-in.

processSteps.title: Audit
processSteps.description: We start with a full site audit — technical health, on-page gaps, content depth, link profile and what your competitors are doing differently.

processSteps.title: Strategy
processSteps.description: From audit to roadmap. We identify the keywords worth targeting, map the content needed, and prioritise what will move the needle fastest.

processSteps.title: Implementation
processSteps.description: We fix what's broken, ship what's needed and earn the links — with weekly updates so you see everything as it happens.

processSteps.title: Measurement
processSteps.description: Live Looker Studio dashboards refreshed weekly and monthly performance reviews. You see what is working and what isn't.

processSteps.title: Scale
processSteps.description: Once results start showing, we double down on what is working, refresh what is slipping, and look for adjacent wins.

faqs.question: How long until I see meaningful results from SEO?
faqs.answer: Most engagements see early technical wins in 30–60 days (indexation, vitals, crawl-budget) and meaningful traffic compounding from month four onward. Significant pipeline impact typically lands between months six and nine — earlier on sites with strong technical fundamentals, later on sites with deep historical debt. We map a realistic timeline during the audit phase.

faqs.question: What size of business do you typically work with?
faqs.answer: Our retainers fit best with funded startups (post Series A) through mid-market and enterprise. The common factor is treating SEO as a strategic channel rather than a tactical cost — measurable revenue attribution, executive sponsorship and a willingness to build for the long term.

faqs.question: How do your engagements and pricing work?
faqs.answer: Most programmes run as monthly retainers scoped against your audit findings — typically $5k–$25k/month depending on technical scope, content volume and authority targets. Standalone audits and one-off migrations are offered as fixed-scope engagements. Every quote is bespoke and follows the discovery call.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee specific keyword rankings?
faqs.answer: No reputable SEO agency does — and any who claim to should be avoided. What we do guarantee is methodology, transparency and reporting rigour. Our retainers include defined deliverables, sprint cadence and live dashboard access so progress against the strategy is visible at all times.

faqs.question: Can you take over from another SEO agency?
faqs.answer: Yes — and it's a common starting point. We begin with a forensic audit of prior work, identify gaps, retain anything compounding well, and rebuild the rest. Transition plans include access handovers, asset inventories and risk reviews so nothing breaks during the swap.

faqs.question: What reporting and tooling will I get access to?
faqs.answer: A custom Looker Studio dashboard pulling Search Console, GA4, your CRM and our internal rank-tracking — refreshed daily. Monthly executive readouts cover narrative, attribution and next-sprint priorities. You also get direct access to the senior strategist running your account.
